name: Daily Digest
description: Daily morning email summary of yesterday's workspace activity, sent to the owner at a scheduled time.

args.subject: Your morning at {{orgName}}
args.body:
Good morning {{firstName}},

Here's a gentle look at what came through Bright Smile yesterday. A few new patients reached out, some appointments were booked, and the team kept things moving — nothing that needs your attention right now.

Sip your coffee, ease into the day, and we'll keep taking good care of everyone who walks through the door.

— Bright Smile Dental
